data.queryValue:
/* ===  Датасет: воронка 9816674 + лиды с тегом «работа с купив»  === */

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Часть 1. Лиды из воронки 9816674, статус «Взяли в работу»
--------------------------------------------------------------------
WITH target_leads AS (
    SELECT id   AS leads_id,
           account_id,
           lead_id
    FROM amocrm_leads
    WHERE pipeline_id = 9816674
),

LeadEvents AS (
    SELECT
        e.leads_id,
        e.account_id,
        e.type,
        e.created_at,
        /* status_id нужен только для lead_status_changed */
        CASE WHEN e.type = 'lead_status_changed'
             THEN ((e.value_after::json->0->>'lead_status')::json->>'id')::int
        END AS status_id
    FROM amocrm_leads_events e
    JOIN target_leads tl ON tl.leads_id = e.leads_id
                        AND tl.account_id = e.account_id
    WHERE e.type IN ('lead_added', 'lead_status_changed')
),

creation AS (
    SELECT leads_id, account_id, MIN(created_at) AS creation_dt
    FROM LeadEvents
    WHERE type = 'lead_added'
    GROUP BY leads_id, account_id
),

work_taken AS (
    SELECT leads_id, account_id, MIN(created_at) AS work_taken_dt
    FROM LeadEvents
    WHERE type = 'lead_status_changed'
      AND status_id = 78200678   -- «Взяли в работу»
    GROUP BY leads_id, account_id
),

pipeline_dataset AS (
    SELECT
        tl.lead_id                     AS crm_id,
        DATE(cr.creation_dt)           AS creation_date,
        cr.creation_dt                 AS creation_date_time,
        wt.work_taken_dt               AS work_taken_datetime,
        NULL::timestamp                AS date_qual,
        NULL::timestamp                AS date_booking,
        NULL::int                      AS qual,
        NULL::int                      AS booking_event
    FROM work_taken wt
    JOIN creation   cr USING (leads_id, account_id)
    JOIN target_leads tl USING (leads_id, account_id)
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Часть 2. Данные из perfomance_all_leads (по тегу)
--------------------------------------------------------------------
perf_dataset AS (
    SELECT
        crm_id,
        creation_date,
        creation_date_time,
        NULL::timestamp                AS work_taken_datetime,
        date_qual,
        date_booking,
        qual,
        booking_event
    FROM perfomance_all_leads
    WHERE tags ILIKE '%работа с купив%'
),

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Объединяем оба набора данных
--------------------------------------------------------------------
all_leads AS (
    SELECT * FROM pipeline_dataset
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM perf_dataset
)

--------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Итог: агрегация по месяцам
--------------------------------------------------------------------
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', creation_date_time)::date AS month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT crm_id) FILTER (WHERE work_taken_datetime IS NOT NULL) AS leads_in_work,
    COUNT(DISTINCT crm_id) FILTER (WHERE date_qual IS NOT NULL)           AS leads_qualed,
    COUNT(DISTINCT crm_id) FILTER (WHERE date_booking IS NOT NULL)        AS bookings
FROM all_leads
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
